pan-steaks.name: Pan Steaks
instructions: Preheat the oven to 450˚F (230˚C).
Season the steaks with salt and pepper on all sides.
Heat a large cast iron pan over medium-high heat until just smoking.
Add the butter and olive oil. Once the butter has melted, add the steaks and cook, without moving for three minutes.
Use tongs to flip the steaks over. Add the rosemary, thyme, and garlic.
Transfer the pan to the oven for 7 minutes for a medium steak.
Using tongs, transfer the steaks to a cutting board. Let the steaks rest for at least 5 minutes.
Slice and serve.
Enjoy!

pan-roasted-sea-bass-with-citrus-and-avo.name: Pan-roasted Sea Bass With Citrus And Avocado Oil

ingredients.item: -ounce skinless fillets white or mexican sea bass or grouper

ingredients.prep: halved, pitted, peeled, cut into wedges

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Using a small sharp knife, cut off all peel and white pith from fruit. Working over a medium bowl, cut between membranes to release segments into bowl. Squeeze in juices from membranes; discard membranes. Drain fruit, reserving 1/2 cup juices. Return segments and juices to bowl. Season with salt and pepper.

Pat fish dry. Season with salt and pepper. Heat a large heavy ovenproof skillet over high heat. Add grapeseed oil. Add fish; cook without moving, occasionally pressing fish gently with a spatula to keep all of surface in contact with pan, until fish is golden brown and releases easily from pan, 4–5 minutes.
Turn fish, transfer to oven, and roast until just opaque in the center, 3–5 minutes.
Place fruit and avocado on plates. Top with fillets. Spoon 2 Tbsp. citrus juices over fruit on each plate. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. avocado oil over fish and fruit.

pancake-cake-lezzet.name: Pancake Cake

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of large drawn antep nuts

instructions: 1. blend flour, baking powder, vanilla and sugar in a bowl.
2. Beat the egg, milk and melted butter in another bowl.
3. Add flour mixture and mix well.
4. Heat the non-stick surface pan.
5. Very light sunflower oil with brush and cook from dough to pan for 2 tablespoons and until the front of the backlight.
6. Repeat the same process until the dough is finished.
7. Beat the cream with the mixer until the sugar and vanilla joins.
8. Wash and slice the berries.
9. Three pankekin breaks on the top-end index by placing cream or berries slices.
10. Serve with overni cream, strawberry and peanut.

pancetta-brussels-sprouts-with-carameliz.name: Pancetta Brussels Sprouts With Caramelized Pecans
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C. Toss the Brussels sprouts with pancetta, olive oil, 1 teaspoon salt and 1 tablespoon of the brown sugar. Place in a casserole pan and cover the pan with a sheet of Reynolds Wrap® Aluminum Foil.
Roast for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue roasting until the Brussels sprouts are lightly browned around the edges, about 10 to 15 minutes more. Remove from oven and set aside.

Melt the butter and remaining tablespoon brown sugar in a medium-sized frying pan over medium heat, stirring every few minutes. Once the sugar has melted, add the pecans and stir to coat. Let them sit for a few minutes until they smell toasty, then stir. Continue to stir every few minutes until most of the pecans are lightly browned and very aromatic.

Remove the pan from the heat and empty the mixture onto a large baking sheet lined with Reynolds® Parchment Paper. Smooth the pecans so they are in one layer, then sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon salt. Place the pan in the freezer for 10 minutes to allow the nuts to harden, then remove the pan and separate the pecans by hand.
Toss the roasted Brussels sprouts with caramelized pecans before serving.

parfait-imma-bee-parfait.name: Parfait: I’mma Bee Parfait
instructions: Spread the yogurt evenly in the bottom of a trifle glass. Top with the granola, fruit, honey, and coconut flakes.
Enjoy!

parian-pumpkin-pie-for-fasting-with-rais.name: Parian Pumpkin Pie For Fasting With Raisins And Walnuts
parian-pumpkin-pie-for-fasting-with-rais.original_name: Παριανή κολοκυθόπιτα νηστίσιμη με σταφίδες και καρύδια

ingredients.item: 1 1/2 kg sweet pumpkin grated on thick grater
1 1/2 cup raisins blonde and black mixed
1 1/2 kg sweet pumpkin grated on thick grater
1 1/2 cup raisins blonde and black mixed

instructions: Rub the pumpkin into a thick grater or chop it into very small pieces.
Heat a large deep pan and add the olive oil. In a strong fire, sauté the pumpkin for 10′, stringing regularly until it softens and saves all its liquids.
Allow it to cool slightly.
Add the sugar, raisins, walnuts, sesame, toast, cinnamon, nutmeg and clove and mix well.
Sprinkle with some olive oil baking pan 36cm.
Set the 4 local leaves radially by spraying them in between with some olive oil.
Empty the filling in a thin layer.
We turn the leaves that are prominent on the pie.
Cover with the two local leaves after oiling them.
Place in portions, sprinkle with all the olive oil left over and sprinkle with the fingers.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 180°C, in the suspensions for about 50′, until the Leaf is browned and the pie is complete removed from the base of the baking pan.
After it cools, we steam with powder and cinnamon.

pastry-twists-with-spiced-sugar-honey-gl.name: Pastry Twists With Spiced Sugar-honey Glaze
instructions: Whisk flour, salt, and yeast in medium bowl to blend well. Add lard and rub in with fingertips until mixture resembles coarse meal. Make well in center of mixture and pour wine into well. Stir with fork until shaggy dough forms. Gather dough together and turn out onto lightly floured work surface. Knead dough until smooth and elastic, adding warm water by teaspoonfuls if dough is dry, about 10 minutes.

Line large baking sheet with parchment paper. Roll out dough on lightly floured surface to 1/8-inch thickness. Using fluted pastry wheel, cut dough into 1 1/4-inch-wide by 4-inch-long strips. Gently twist each strip in center, forming bow. Place pastry twists on prepared baking sheet. Reroll dough scraps to 1/8-inch thickness and cut out additional strips. Twist strips and place on prepared baking sheet.

Pour enough olive oil into large saucepan to reach depth of 1 1/2 inches. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of pan with bulb submerged in oil; heat oil to 182°C. Working in batches, fry dough twists in oil until golden on all sides, turning occasionally, 2 to 3 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer fried pastries to paper towels to drain. Cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Line another large baking sheet with parchment paper. Bring honey to simmer in medium saucepan. Remove from heat. Cool until just warm. Whisk powdered sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in medium bowl to blend.

Working with 1 fried pastry at a time, dip pastry into warm honey. Lift pastry and shake gently, allowing excess honey to drip back into pan. Roll pastry in powdered sugar mixture to coat. Place on prepared baking sheet. Arrange pastries on platter.
To avoid coating your fingers in the sticky glaze, use one hand for dipping the pastry twists in honey and the other for rolling the pastry in the powdered sugar mixture.

Finish the meal with a glass of Moscato, a sweet white wine. Donatella recommends the 2007 Rivera 'Piani di Tufara' Moscato di Trani, Dolce (Italy, $15). The wine's spicy raisin notes are complemented by bitter almond flavors and an apricot finish. If that bottle is unavailable, try the 2008 Michele Chiarlo Nivole Moscato D'Asti (Italy, $16), a sparkling Moscato with stone-fruit flavors.

pattis-triple-cranberry-sauce.name: Patti's Triple Cranberry Sauce
instructions: Stir the cranberry juice concentrate and sugar together in a saucepan over medium-high heat, and bring to a boil, stirring until sugar has dissolved. Mix in the fresh and dried cranberries, reduce heat to medium, and cook until the dried cranberries soften and the fresh ones pop, 7 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat.

Mix in the orange marmalade, orange juice, orange peel, and allspice until thoroughly combined. Allow the cranberry sauce to cool completely. Pour into glass serving dish, cover, and chill until cold, at least 2 hours. Can be made up to 2 days ahead of time and refrigerated until serving.

peach-and-raspberry-crumble.name: Peach And Raspberry Crumble

ingredients.prep: pitted and sliced into equal crescents

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine peaches, raspberries, ½ cup white sugar, lemon juice, and ½ tablespoon cinnamon in a bowl.
Combine oats, flour, butter, remaining ¼ cup white sugar, brown sugar, remaining ½ tablespoon cinnamon, and salt in a separate bowl until thoroughly smooth and not lumpy.
Pour peach-raspberry mixture into a large ceramic baking dish, spreading evenly; top evenly with oat crumble mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 35 minutes.

peach-sauce.name: Peach Sauce
instructions: Whisk tea and cornstarch together in a small bowl; transfer to a saucepan. Add peaches and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until just boiling, 2 to 3 minutes.

Stir in white sugar, brown sugar, and nutmeg; simmer over medium-low heat until sauce is thickened, about 10 minutes. Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes to thicken.

peach-semifreddo-teleculinaria.name: Peach Semifreddo
instructions: Make a gelatin sachet, as instructed in the package. Pass a form by cold water, have the peach halves run at the bottom and pour the gelatine prepared on top. Take it to the freezer until you start arresting.

Bring to the fire 2.5 dl of water, boil, add the contents of the second gelatin sachet, stirring well until dissolved. Then add the peach syrup and stir from time to time until it gets almost cold. Beat the clears in castle with sugar and wrap them gently in this mixture.

Remove the shape of the freezer, pour over the previous mixture and take it to the refrigerator until it is very firm. Then remove, pass the bottom of the shape by hot water, carefully unform for a wide dish and serve decorated to taste.

peach-infused-moonshine.name: Peach-infused Moonshine
instructions: Combine vodka, canned peaches with their syrup, and dried peaches in a 2-qt. jar (save vodka bottle to store finished product, if desired). Cover and let stand at room temperature at least 1 day and up to 1 week. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into reserved bottle or a jar; discard solids.
DO AHEAD: Moonshine can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.

peanut-dacquoise-with-peanut-butter-mous.name: Peanut Dacquoise With Peanut Butter Mousse

ingredients.item: Roasted spanish salted peanuts with skin (6 to 6 1/2 ounces)

instructions: Preheat oven to 135°C. Line large baking sheet with parchment paper. Draw three 10 x 4 1/2-inch rectangles on parchment; turn parchment over. Finely grind 1 cup nuts with 1/4 cup sugar in processor. Coarsely chop remaining 1/4 cup nuts and set aside.

Using electric mixer, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and coarse salt in large bowl until foamy. With mixer running, gradually add remaining 1/2 cup sugar, beating until meringue is stiff and glossy. Add ground nut mixture and coarsely chopped nuts; fold gently just to blend.
Spoon 2 cups meringue onto each rectangle on parchment; spread evenly to fill rectangles (any remaining meringue can be baked as cookies).
Bake meringues until golden brown all over and dry to touch but still slightly soft, about 1 hour 30 minutes. Transfer to rack and cool completely.

Using electric mixer, beat peanut butter, brown sugar, and coarse salt in medium bowl to blend. With mixer running, gradually beat in 1/4 cup cream. Add another 1/4 cup cream and beat just to blend. Beat remaining ½ cup cream, sugar, and vanilla in another medium bowl until peaks form; fold into peanut butter mixture in 3 additions. Chill until ready to use.

Whisk cocoa powder and sugar in medium saucepan to blend well. Gradually add 1/4 cup water, whisking until smooth. Gradually whisk in heavy cream. Bring to boil over medium heat, whisking frequently. Reduce heat to low. Add chocolate and whisk until melted and smooth. Let stand at room temperature until cool and slightly thickened, stirring occasionally, about 2 hours.

Leaving meringues on parchment and using large serrated knife, trim edges of each meringue to original 10x4 1/2-inch size. Slide thin knife between meringues and paper to loosen. Spoon 1/4 cup glaze evenly over top of 2 meringue rectangles and spread to cover. Chill until chocolate sets, about 30 minutes. Place 1 glazed meringue rectangle on plate. Spoon half of mousse over (scant 1 1/4 cups); spread out in even layer. Place second glazed meringue rectangle atop first; spread with remaining mousse. Top with unglazed meringue rectangle. Pour 1/2 cup glaze down center of top meringue. Using icing spatula, spread glaze over top meringue, allowing glaze to drip down sides. Smooth top and sides to cover evenly with thin layer. Refrigerate until glaze is set, about 30 minutes. Pour remaining glaze over top of dacquoise and quickly smooth over top and sides in even layer. Sprinkle fleur de sel lightly over top, if desired. Chill at least 3 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover with cake dome and keep chilled.

pearl-street-toddy.name: Pearl Street Toddy
instructions: Stir first 6 ingredients in 8-ounce mug. Sprinkle freshly grated nutmeg over and serve.

penne-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Penne With Minced Meat
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep pan and add the minced meat.
We was it from all sides for 7’-8’ to change color and half-baked.
Add the onion, garlic, cellery and carrot and sauce for 5 minutes to Wilt.
Add the wine.
Mix and let them boil.
Add the tomatoes, salt and pepper and then add the parsley and sugar.
Cover, lower the heat and simmer for 25 minutes until the minced meat is poured.
Boil the pasta in salted water for 2 minutes less than in the package.
Sweep the pennies and pour them into the minced meat.
Turn up the fire for 2 minutes and mix.
Turn off the fire, add the myzithra, mix and serve in deep dishes.

peperonata.name: Peperonata
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot. Add onions and garlic; cook and stir until soft and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.

Stir potatoes, tomatoes, red bell peppers, yellow bell peppers, water, tomato paste, capers, and basil into the pot. Cook until potatoes and peppers are soft, adding more water if needed, about 45 minutes. Season with pepper.

peras-con-alguashte.name: Peras Con Alguashte
instructions: Toss pears and lime juice in a medium bowl to coat.
Shake in a few good dashes of hot sauce to taste, season with salt, and toss to coat.
Sprinkle generously with Alguashte and top with mint leaves if using.

philadelphia-cheesecake.name: Philadelphia Cheesecake
instructions: Mix cookie crumbs, butter, and 3 tablespoons sugar together until combined; press firmly onto the bottom of a 9-inch nonstick springform pan.
Beat cream cheese, 1 cup sugar, and vanilla in a mixing bowl until smooth.
Add eggs, one at a time, mixing on low speed until just blended. Pour over crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until center is almost set, about 45 to 55 minutes.
Loosen cake from the pan rim; cool before removing rim.
Refrigerate for 4 hours before serving.

picadillo-ground-beef-quesadillas.name: Picadillo Ground Beef Quesadillas

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place diced potato in a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Drain.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add cooked potato and brown on all sides for about 3 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.

Add ground beef to the skillet; cook and stir until browned, crumbly, and no longer pink in the center, 4 to 5 minutes. Stir in bell pepper, onion, and garlic; cook until softened, 3 to 4 minutes. Drain as much fat from the pan as possible.

Stir in tomato sauce, water, olive brine, oregano, salt, and pepper until well combined. Add olives, raisins, and reserved potatoes; stir well. Reduce heat to low and simmer picadillo for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and spray with cooking spray. Place a tortilla in the hot skillet and cook until browned, 1 to 2 minutes per side.

Spread about 1/4 cup hot picadillo on one half of the hot tortilla. Top with Mexican cheese, then fold tortilla in half, pressing down with a spatula. Cook until cheese is melted, about 1 more minute. Repeat to cook remaining quesadillas.
Cut each quesadilla into 3 triangles to serve.

pickled-chicken-grandmas-recipe-pequerec.name: Pickled Chicken, Grandma's Recipe
pickled-chicken-grandmas-recipe-pequerec.original_name: Pollo en escabeche, la receta de la abuela

ingredients.item: 350 g aceite de oliva virgen extra
3/4 partes de un vaso (de los de vino) de vinagre de jerez

instructions: Salpimentamos el pollo. Pasamos por harina y damos unos toques a cada pieza, para eliminar el exceso de harina

We put raw onion cut into slices, carrot cut into slices, laurel, whole pepper grains, thyme, rosemary and garlic head cut in half. Let's put the olive oil in a frying pan, and when it's hot, we'll fry the chicken. That step was very important and a good frying was necessary to achieve a rich scattering.

Let's put the fried chicken pieces above the bed we have prepared with the onion and the other ingredients, we put the frying oil above. We add vinegar and water, the amount of water is indicative, they have to come to float just cover a little more than half.
We'll cook till it's done. A medium chicken usually takes about three quarters of an hour to cook in a traditional saucer (with no light or fast). Test before you finish, if you have to rectify.
The chicken can be put into scattering at once, but if you put it in the refrigerator, it'll be even more tasty the next day. It's been well preserved in an airtight container for up to a week.

piglet-patties-teleculinaria.name: Piglet Patties

ingredients.item: Immediate consumption: pig rissols are best appreciated when fresh and fresh to fry. the crust will be at its crispest point and the filling deliciously hot.
Accompaniments: although delicious by itself, the rissols can be accompanied by a light sauce or a simple salad to add freshness and contrast.
Variations: Although the piglet is the traditional stuffing, some chefs like to experiment with different types of meat or additions such as mushrooms or cheese, adapting the classic to new tastes.

instructions: Prepare the dough: light a pot with water, butter, olive oil and a pinch of salt. When boiling, lower the heat, add the flour and wrap it very well. When the dough is released from the bottom of the pot, remove and let it cool.
Prepare the filling: light a pot with butter, add the onion and chopped garlic and let it shine. Add the flour, stir, then add some water and wrap it very well until creamy.
Add the piglet and let it cook. Finally, season with the chopped parsley, salt and pepper, wrap, then remove and let it cool.
Extend the dough, cut it in circles, have in the center 1 spoon (soup) of the filling and close them in half-moon, joining the ends well.
Pass the rissols by flour, egg beaten and bread grated and fry them in abundant and very hot oil until golden. Remove them with a skimmer, let them run down on absorbent paper and serve.

pineapple-punch.name: Pineapple Punch
instructions: Put frozen pineapple, banana, coconut milk, orange juice, and water into blender and blend until smooth.
Serve over ice.
Enjoy!

pineapple-upside-down-cake.name: Pineapple Upside-down Cake

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
Ground mace or freshly grated nutmeg

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Place a 13x9" metal baking pan by the stove. Cook brown sugar, butter, vanilla extract, and salt in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until butter is melted and mixture is bubbling, about 5 minutes. Pour caramel into baking pan and spread to evenly coat bottom with a heatproof rubber spatula, nudging into corners.
Arrange pineapple slices on top of caramel without overlapping. Place a cherry in the center of each pineapple ring. Set aside.
Whisk flour, baking powder, salt, and mace in a medium bowl. Whisk eggs and vanilla extract in a small bowl.

Beat butter and granulated sugar in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with paddle attachment on medium-high speed until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add egg mixture in 4 batches, beating on medium speed 30 seconds after each addition and scraping down bowl as needed. Reduce mixer speed to low and beat in dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with sour cream in 2 additions, mixing 30 seconds after each addition. Fold batter a few times with a clean spatula, scraping down sides to make sure everything is well mixed. Scrape batter into reserved baking pan; smooth surface.

Bake cake until golden and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 40–50 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack; let cake cool in pan 15 minutes. Run an offset spatula along edges of cake to loosen. Set a large platter over pan and flip over to release cake; carefully remove pan. If any fruit or cake sticks to pan, scrape it off and press back onto top of cake. Serve warm or room temperature.
Do ahead: Cake can be baked 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

pineapple-shrimp-stir-fry.name: Pineapple-shrimp Stir-fry
instructions: Measure out 1/4 cup pineapple juice from the can and add to a small mixing bowl. Set pineapple chunks aside and reserve any extra juice for another use or discard.

Add soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, fish sauce, and pepper flakes to the pineapple juice; stir until well combined. Transfer 1/4 cup of the mixture to a small bowl and leave the rest in the mixing bowl.

Heat a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add avocado oil to the hot skillet and heat until it shimmers, about 30 seconds. Add red onion and bell peppers; cook and stir for 1 to 2 minutes. Add broccoli; cook and stir for 1 minute.
Add the sauce from the mixing bowl and bring to a boil. Add shrimp and cook until they turn pink and begin to curl, 2 to 3 minutes.
Meanwhile, stir cornstarch into the sauce in the small bowl, mixing until there are no lumps. Slowly add to the skillet, stirring constantly. Add reserved pineapple chunks.
Cook until sauce thickens, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove from the heat and sprinkle cashews over top. Serve immediately.

pistachio-triangle-cookie-lezzet.name: Pistachio Triangle Cookie
instructions: 1. Heat oven 180 degrees.
2. Place oil paper into a shallow container with 23 cm diameter.
3. Cook the butter and powder sugar into a bowl and from the mixer to the cream consistency.
4. Add and knead flour and cocoa.
5. Oiled paper is released by pressing the tray with your hands.
6. Spread the irid Antep nuts on your hand and gently press it with your hands.
7. Cut to 16 equal slices with knives (accuracy up to half as it will not be worth the tray).
8. Cook for 15-20 minutes in hot oven.
9. Well cut the slices after taking.
10. Serve.

pizza-dough-basic-recipe-argiro.name: Pizza Dough (basic Recipe)

ingredients.item: 500 gr approximately flour strong (starene flour for bread or 00)
A little cornmeal for opening the dough
500 gr approximately flour strong (starene flour for bread or 00)
A little cornmeal for opening the dough

instructions: Add the strong flour for pizza and salt in a bowl and mix with a spoon.
We're doing a puddle downtown.
Dissolve the yeast in a bit of water and add the sugar.
Cover with membrane and allow for 10 minutes to activate. When the surface is foamed, it is ready. If you use dry yeast powder, you can overlook this stage.
Add the activated yeast to the flour.
Add the olive oil to the water and add it to the flour. With a spoon, mix around, from the center to the outside.
When the dough becomes mass (it will be wet), empty all the ingredients on the counter, as well as the remaining flour in the bowl.
With floured hands we begin and knead with strong movements. We pull into the dough, open it and re-pick it.
The pizza dough must be soft, elastic and supple. Fermentation and working the dough slowly drinks the flour and eventually becomes smooth and soft.

pizza-with-zucchini-salami-and-feta-argi.name: Pizza With Zucchini, Salami And Feta
pizza-with-zucchini-salami-and-feta-argi.original_name: Πίτσα με κολοκυθάκι, σαλάμι και φέτα

ingredients.item: 1 piece tender cut into very thin slices
1 piece tender cut into very thin slices

instructions: Open the dough on a pizza basis, either with the finger tips by pressing with circular movements on a floured surface, or with a mold if you want it to become thinner and crisper.
We have preheated the oven very well at the highest temperature in the resistors and put down the baking pan or sheet to burn well.
Sprinkle the baking pan with some cornice.
That's how we get a crisper crust at the bottom of the pizza.
Place the dough on the cutting wood.
Brush with the tomato sauce leaving a gap of 2-3 cm to inflate around and keep the ingredients inside.
Add the salami, pumpkins, mozzarella and basil.
Place small pieces of feta between the blanks, pour with the olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake for about 15 minutes to brown around and become crispy.

plain-genoise.name: Plain Genoise
instructions: Set a rack in the middle level of the oven and preheat to 350 degrees.
Half-fill a medium saucepan with water and bring it to a boil over high heat. Lower the heat so the water is simmering.

Whisk the eggs, yolks, salt, and sugar together in the bowl of a heavy-duty mixer. Place over the pan of simmering water and whisk gently until the mixture is just lukewarm, about 100 degrees (test with your finger). Attach the bowl to the mixer and, with the whisk attachment, whip on medium-high speed until the egg mixture is cooled (touch the outside of the bowl to tell) and tripled in volume. The egg foam will be thick and will form a slowly dissolving ribbon falling back onto the bowl of whipped eggs when the whisk is lifted.
While the eggs are whipping, stir together the flour and cornstarch.

Sift one-third of the flour mixture over the beaten eggs. Use a rubber spatula to fold in the flour mixture, making sure to scrape all the way to the bottom of the bowl on every pass through the batter to prevent the flour mixture from accumulating there and making lumps. Repeat with another third of the flour mixture and finally with the remainder.
Scrape the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
Bake the gênoise for about 25 minutes, or until well risen, deep gold, and firm to the touch.

Immediately use a small pairing knife to loosen the cake from the sides of the pan. Invert the cake onto a rack, then reinvert onto another rack and let the cake cool right side up on the paper. Remove the paper when the cake is cool.

player-piano.name: Player Piano
instructions: Combine Aperol, elderflower liqueur, fresh lime juice, rhum agricole, and Bittermens 'Elemakule Tiki Bitters in a shaker tin with ice. Shake vigorously until well chilled, 10–15 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

plum-and-avocado-salad-teleculinaria.name: Plum And Avocado Salad

ingredients.item: 2 fresh cheeses (80 g) or 1 curd (170 g)

instructions: Start by preparing the sauce: mix the olive oil with the orange shaving and let it rest for 10 minutes. Then add the vinegar and orange juice, stir, cover and book in the fridge.
Wash the plums thoroughly and cut them in rooms, rejecting the lump. Peel and peel the avocados and cut into pieces; drain the cheeses and cut them into cubes.
Lay the mixture of lettuce in a salad bowl, dispose of the pieces of plum and avocado, the cubes of cheese and nuts.
When serving, remove the sauce from the cold, add herbs to taste, season with salt and pepper and stir well. Lie on the salad and serve immediately.

poached-eggs-on-bread-teleculinaria.name: Poached Eggs On Bread
instructions: Praise the onion and garlic, peeled and roughly minced, in a pot with olive oil and blonde, then add the tomato, thyme branch, sugar, salt and pepper, let it reduce a little, remove from the fire and eliminate the blond and thyme.
With a knife, cut off a "cup" to the bread, take off his brain with his hands, put it inside the bread, add the crelos and water it with the tomato sauce.

Break the eggs into a bowl, then put them inside the bread, one by one, and cover with the respective lid. Have it on a tray and put it in the oven, preheated at 175°C, for about 30 minutes. Make sure the eggs are cooked to your liking, remove from the oven and serve immediately.

pog-juice.name: Pog Juice
instructions: Combine passion fruit juice, guava nectar, and orange juice in a large glass pitcher and stir well. Chill until ready to serve.

polenta-with-mushrooms-argiro.name: Polenta With Mushrooms

ingredients.item: 1 small dry onion very finely chopped
1 small dry onion very finely chopped

instructions: Add the broth to a pot with a thick base and let it boil.
Salt at will and add the polenta rainy, stirring regularly with a wooden spoon because it works easily at the base of the vessel.
Lower the heat and simmer and stir regularly for 25 minutes, until the grain bursts and the polenta thickens.
Remove it from the house and incorporate the butter, stirring to melt.
Finally, add the parmesan and mix.
Allow the polenta to stand for 2-3 minutes covered.

polish-pierogi-ruskie-polish-potato-and-.name: Polish Pierogi Ruskie (polish Potato And Cheese Dumplings)
polish-pierogi-ruskie-polish-potato-and-.original_name: Pierogi ruskie polacos (empanadillas polacas de patata y queso)

ingredients.item: 250 g quark or drained recess cheese (or dry fresh cheese)

instructions: Cook 500 g whole potatoes with skin with salt for 25 minutes or till tender.
Listen to them, let them tempt and put them and clap them up and get a fine purée with no clumps.
While chewing the potatoes, pits 1 very fine big onion and pits them into a frying pan with 2 tablespoons of butter for 10 minutes till it's soft and slightly golden.
Mix the potato purée with pitted onion, add 250 g of well drained quark cheese or recess, salt and black pepper to suit and mix up to a homogenous pilling. Reserve.
In a large bowl mix 500 g of flour with 1 teaspoon of salt. Add 1 egg, 1 tablespoon of oil and 250 ml of temperate water and mix them to form a mass.
Fold up the counter for 8 minutes till smooth and elastic.
Cover with a cloth and let rest 20 minutes..
Estira la masa con rodillo hasta dejarla fina (unos 2 mm).
It cuts circles about 8 cm in diameter.
Put a tablespoon of pilling at the centre of each circle and wet the edges with a little water.
Dobla formando media luna y sella bien los bordes presionando con los dedos.
Presiona los bordes entre dos dedos, haciendo unos pellizcos.
It steals the periogi into abundant water with salt in tands for 3 minutes after they get up to the surface. Take them with mog.
Pig 1 large onion in fine pen and dold it in a frying pan with 40 g butter for 10-12 minutes till it's well golden and slightly caramelized.
Serve hot periogi with golden onion and butter above. If you wish, you can skip them first in that same frying pan for 3-4 minutes so they have a light color.

pollo-fritto.name: Pollo Fritto

ingredients.prep: cut into 8 pieces, backbone and wing tips

instructions: A deep-fry thermometer
Place chicken, thyme sprigs, garlic, bay leaves, oil, and lemon slices in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper and toss to coat. Chill at least 4 hours or up to 8 hours.

Remove chicken from marinade and pat dry; discard marinade. Lightly beat 4 eggs in a large bowl; add chicken and toss to coat. Let stand 1 hour. (Bringing the chicken to room temperature ensures even frying).

Fit a large cast-iron skillet or other heavy straight-sided skillet (not nonstick) with deep-fry thermometer; pour in oil to measure 1" and heat over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 350°.

Place 1 1/2 cups flour in a shallow bowl; season with salt and pepper. Remove chicken from egg, letting excess drip back into bowl. Dredge in flour, shaking off excess. Working in 2 batches, fry chicken, turning often with tongs and adjusting heat to maintain temperature between 325°–350°, until skin is deep golden brown and an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of chicken piece registers 165°, 10–12 minutes for wings and 12–15 minutes for thighs, legs, and breasts. Transfer chicken to a wire rack set inside a large baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Let cool at least 10 minutes before serving.

Meanwhile, place remaining 1 cup flour in another shallow bowl and lightly beat remaining 2 eggs in a medium bowl. Coat artichoke hearts (no need to thaw) in eggs, letting excess drip back into bowl, and dredge in remaining 1 cup flour, shaking off excess. Fry, turning occasionally, until golden brown, 5–7 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
Coat sage and oregano sprigs in remaining egg mixture and fry until just golden, about 1 minute per side.
Serve fried chicken, artichokes, and herbs with lemon wedges.

pork-chops-with-fig-and-grape-agrodolce.name: Pork Chops With Fig And Grape Agrodolce

ingredients.prep: leaves separated and cut into medium pieces

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Season pork chops on both sides with 1 1/4 tsp. salt and 1 tsp. pepper.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over high. Working in batches if needed, sear pork chops until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer chops to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; reserve pan drippings in skillet. Roast pork until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 57°C, about 15 minutes. Let pork rest 5 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat skillet with drippings over medium-high. Add vinegar and cook, scraping up drippings with a wooden spoon. Stir in red pepper flakes, if using, 2 Tbsp. honey, and 1/4 tsp. salt. Add grapes, figs, and rosemary and stir to coat. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thickened and fruit is softened, about 8 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in butter.
Whisk lemon juice, mustard, and remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, 1 tsp. honey, 1/2 tsp. salt, and 1/4 tsp. pepper in a large bowl. Add radicchio and parsley and toss to coat.
Divide radicchio salad and pork chops among plates. Top with agrodolce.

pork-enchiladas-rojas.name: Pork Enchiladas Rojas

ingredients.item: Homemade chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Toast coriander seeds in a small skillet over medium heat, swirling pan often and adding cumin seeds during the last 30 seconds of cooking, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Let cool, then finely grind in spice mill or with mortar and pestle.
Bring guajillo, ancho, and morita chiles and stock to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Cover, remove from heat, and let sit 30 minutes to let chiles soften.
Transfer chile mixture to a blender and add toasted spices, garlic, tomato paste, and oregano and purée until smooth, about 2 minutes.

Preheat oven to 250°. Heat oil in a medium heavy pot over medium-high. Season pork with salt and cook, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides, 10–12 minutes. Pour off excess oil and add chile purée and bay leaves. Bring to a boil, cover, and transfer to oven. Braise pork until meat is very tender and shreds easily, 1 ½–2 hours; season with salt.

Skim excess fat from chile sauce; discard bay leaves. Transfer pork to a large bowl. Let cool slightly, then shred with 2 forks. Mix ½ cup chile sauce into pork; season with salt. Set remaining sauce aside.
Do Ahead: Pork can be braised 3 days ahead. Let cool in chile sauce (do not shred); cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 425°. Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium-high until it bubbles immediately when edge of tortilla touches the surface. Working one at a time, fry tortillas until just starting to brown and crisp, about 10 seconds per side (they should still be somewhat pliable). Transfer to paper towels to drain.

Dip both sides of each tortilla in chile sauce just to coat, then transfer to a rimmed baking sheet. Spread 1 cup sauce down the length of a 13x9" baking dish. Spoon ¼ cup pork mixture across the center of a tortilla and fold one side over filling, then continue to roll up tortilla. Place seam side down in prepared baking dish. Repeat with more sauce and remaining tortillas (enchiladas should be nestled right up against each other in pan). Top with cheese and remaining sauce. Bake until sauce is bubbling and cheese is beginning to brown, 15–20 minutes. Let sit 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, purée avocado, sour cream, lime juice, and ¼ cup water in a food processor, adding more water to thin as needed, until smooth and creamy; season with salt.
Top enchiladas with onion slices and drizzle with avocado cream. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

pork-fricassee-argiro.name: Pork Fricassee

ingredients.item: 1 kg pig cut into small portions
1 mash fresh onions tenderly chopped (with their green leaves)
1 kg pig cut into small portions
1 mash fresh onions tenderly chopped (with their green leaves)

instructions: Dry the meat on absorbent paper first.
Heat a plate pot over medium to high heat and sauce the meat in the olive oil.
Allow the meat to brown around for 6 to 8 minutes.
Add the chopped dry onion and the white part of the fresh versions and sauce for 3 to 4 minutes, to make it clear.
Add the wine and mix the ingredients.
Rub the base of the pot.
Allow the wine to evaporate completely and add some (about 1.5 cup) hot water or meat broth until the pork is half covered.
Cut the stems from the dill, tie them and add them to the pork frikase.
Cover the pot, lower the heat to medium to low and simmer for about 1 hour until the meat softens and is tender.
After the pork boils, we reveal the pot.
Add the lettuces, green finely chopped leaves of fresh onions and grasses.
Simmer for 10 minutes and add salt and pepper.
Finally, add the chopped dill and boil for 5 minutes.
At this point, pork freaks must have a few fluids.
Remove the food from the fire to settle its boil.
Beat the whites to fluffy in bowls, add the yolks and beat well.
Finally, add the lemon juice and mix the egg lemon.
With a spoon, gradually add broth from the food to the eggmeal, stirring constantly to balance the temperature of the eggmeal with the temperature of the food.
Add the eggmeal to the food and shake the pot from the handles to go everywhere.
Remove the stems of the flower.
Serve the pork frikaze warm, in deep dishes.

pork-knuckle-in-the-oven-with-potatoes-a.name: Pork Knuckle In The Oven With Potatoes
pork-knuckle-in-the-oven-with-potatoes-a.original_name: Χοιρινό κότσι στο φούρνο με πατάτες

4 cuts of pork around 1,300 each with bone and skin

We make holes in the meat, not the skin and enter the mixture with the materials.
We're touching every bone in paper tape.
We're putting in orange pieces.

Bake for 2 hours and 30 minutes in a well-heated oven of 180
Open the parchment paper and rub the guts with their liquids.
Add all the ingredients for the potatoes to a baking pan and mix them.
Cover the baking pan and bake at 180
Open the balls, pour all the juice from the package into the potatoes and touch the guts up.
Continue baking for about 35 minutes.
We regularly rub the guts with the liquids of the baking pan.
Serve the guts whole with the potatoes and deboned at the table.
Each bone corresponds to about 21⁄2 ports after removing the bone and skin.
Read all the secrets to cook each piece of pork properly.

portuguese-style-beef-steaks-teleculinar.name: Portuguese Style Beef Steaks
instructions: Peel the potatoes, cut them in slices and fry them in oil. Meanwhile, fix the steaks and season them with salt and pepper. Peel, wash and pinch garlic teeth.

Take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil and butter, let it warm, add the slices of ham, let them fry a little on both sides, remove them and book them. Add garlic, blond leaf and steaks to the same frying pan and let the steaks on both sides fry to taste.

Then add the white wine, let it boil until evaporate, remove from the fire and serve with the slices of ham and accompanied with the chips run. Decorate to taste, for example with olives and chopped parsley.

potato-frittata.name: Potato Frittata

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Whisk 12 large eggs, ½ cup heavy cream, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper in a large bowl until combined; whisk in ½ cup finely chopped cilantro.

Heat ¼ cup vegetable oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Cook 1 large russet potato (about 8 oz.), peeled, cut into ⅛"-thick matchsticks, stirring occasionally, until beginning to brown around the edges, about 4 minutes. Add 1 small onion, thinly sliced, and 3 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and season with remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is softened and beginning to brown around the edges, about 3 minutes.

Pour egg mixture into skillet and cook, undisturbed, until edges are just set, about 2 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven and bake frittata until puffed and just set, with a slight wobble in the center when gently shaken, 18–23 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes.
Season frittata with more pepper and flaky sea salt. Run a small offset spatula around sides to loosen, then cut into wedges. Serve with sriracha.

prepare-2-cocktails-with-vodka-and-coffe.name: Prepare 2 Cocktails With Vodka And Coffee
prepare-2-cocktails-with-vodka-and-coffe.original_name: Prepara 2 cocteles con vodka y café

If you think she's missing some olive oil, add to get her better cold.
Keep cooking till his liver's sealed and sodas. At this point, add the ham and finish cooking. That'll take about 15 or 20 minutes.
Retification of salt or pepper and turn off. Enjoy!

prepare-mussels-with-vinaigrette-comeder.name: Prepare Mussels With Vinaigrette
instructions: Fold a glass of water into a pot with a slice of lemon and a bay leaf till it boils.
When at its boiling point, add clear mussels and cook till shellfish open.
Once all are open, remove from the pot and let run.
Trocks onion and peppers into small pieces.
Agrega en un bol, sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto y agrega aceite de oliva al gusto. Mezcla muy bien.
Incorpora los mejillones, y mezcla hasta que se fusione con las verduras.
Serves and goes with the cut parsley. Enjoy!

prepare-some-juicy-grilled-chicken-breas.name: Prepare Some Juicy Grilled Chicken Breasts with Quinoa And Sautéed Vegetables
prepare-some-juicy-grilled-chicken-breas.original_name: Prepara unas jugosas pechugas de pollo a la plancha con quinoa y verduras salteadas

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo (150-180 g cada una)
1 cda de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 ½ cups of low sodium water or vegetable stock
1 / 2 cdite of turmeric or curry powder
1 / 2 cup of broccoli with small branches
1 small carrot with or with fine julian
1 cdite of sesame or olive oil
Salsa de soya baja en sodio al gusto (opcional)

instructions: Lava bien la quinoa bajo el grifo con ayuda de un colador fino para eliminar las saponinas y evitar el sabor amargo.

Put it in a pot with water or broth, the bay leaf and the turmeric. Cooking with medium-low heat with cover for 15- 18 minutes, or until the grain is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed. Remove the laurel leaf and leave a cover for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, I put chicken breasts in a bowl with olive oil, mustard, lemon, garlic, cumin, salt and pepper. Let at least 10 minutes stand (ideally 30).
In a hot frying pan, cook the plate breasts for 5-6 minutes by the side, or until they are golden out and completely cooked inside. Withdrawal and leave to stand 3 minutes before cutting into strips.

In another frying pan, scattering the vegetables into sesame oil for 5-7 minutes. Add soy sauce if you wish to have a more umami touch. Vegetables have to be put to the dente to preserve texture and nutrients.
Serves a quinoa bed on each plate, distribute the salted vegetables and place the chicken onto strips above. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

prepare-these-beef-bites-with-tzatziki-s.name: Prepare These Beef Bites With Tzatziki Sauce
prepare-these-beef-bites-with-tzatziki-s.original_name: Prepara estos bitoques de ternera con salsa tzatziki

ingredients.item: 300 gr de carne de ternera (molida o picada)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
Toma la cebolla, pela y corta en cubitos. Trocea las hojas de menta y filetea el diente de ajo.
Add ground or minced beef into a bowl. Add onion, mind leaves and steamed garlic.
Fitted with salt and pepper to taste. The paprika and a touch of oregan.
Con ayuda de un tenedor o cuchara mezcla bien todos los ingredientes hasta que queden integrados perfectamente.
Engrasa un poco tus manos, haz bolitas medianas con la carne sazonada, luego aplasta con las yemas de los dedos.
Coloca los bitoques en una bandeja con papel encerado y hornea por 10 minutos o hasta que queden jugosas.
While baked, prepare the sauce. Peel the cucumber and cut into small cubes and chew the mint leaves.
En un recipiente agrega el yogurt griego, el zumo de la lima. el pepino cortado y las hojas de menta troceadas.

When the moustaches are ready and at temperature, put them onto a plate. Gather tzatziki sauce and get ready.
Enjoy!

prepare-this-cowboy-salad-very-crunchy-a.name: Prepare This Cowboy Salad, Very Crunchy And Filling
prepare-this-cowboy-salad-very-crunchy-a.original_name: Prepara esta ensalada cowboy, bien crujiente y contundente

ingredients.item: 1   pechuga de pollo a la parrilla o a la plancha, cortada en tiras (250 g)
1 taza de frijoles negros cocidos y escurridos
1  tomate grande o 10 tomates cherry, cortados
1 / 2 Red pepper, cut into small cubes
50 gr de queso tipo cheddar o mezcla tex-mex, rallado
3 cdas de semillas de calabaza o tiras de tortilla frita (opcional)
3 cdas de yogur natural o crema agria
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva

instructions: Saxony the chicken breast with salt and pepper and a pinch of cumin. Cook her to the plate or grill until she's well golden and juicy inside. Let them stand for 5 minutes and cut them into strips.
In a big bowl, put the black beans, corn, tomato, purple onion and red pepper. Gently mix.
Incorpora el aguacate y el cilantro fresco con cuidado para no machacar los ingredientes.
Add tibia or cold chicken as preferred.
In a separate bowl, mix all the dressings and get a creamy and homogenous salsa. Adjust salt and acidity.
Vierte el aderezo sobre la ensalada justo antes de servir y mezcla ligeramente.
Termina con el queso rallado y las semillas de calabaza o tiras de tortilla para un toque crujiente.

pretzel-roll-bread-pudding.name: Pretzel Roll Bread Pudding
instructions: Position a rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a medium baking dish with cooking spray. Cut pretzel rolls into cubes; set aside.

Pulse coconut in a food processor for 30 seconds. Transfer to a saucepan with milk, sugar, raisins, butter, salt, almond extract, and vanilla. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring gently, until mixture is warm and sugar has dissolved, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from the heat.
Beat eggs in a large bowl. Add warm milk mixture, pecans, and cubed pretzel rolls and stir until evenly coated. Let stand to absorb liquid, at least 10 minutes.

Transfer bread mixture to the prepared baking dish and set it inside a larger baking dish. Add hot water to the large baking dish to surround the bread pudding, approximately 1/2 inch to 1 inch up the side.
Carefully place on the center rack of the preheated oven and bake until golden brown and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 40 to 45 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes before serving.

provencal-osso-buco-recipe-comedera.name: Provençal Osso Buco Recipe
instructions: Sazona las piezas de osobuco con sal y pimienta por ambos lados.
Calienta una cazuela con aceite de oliva.
Sella la carne por ambos lados hasta que quede dorada. Retira y reserva.
That same casserole adds more oil and pits his garlic teeth by his onion for a few minutes.
Vierte el vino blanco y desglasa el fondo. Cocina hasta que reduzca.
Incorpora los tomates triturados, el laurel, el romero y el tomillo. Sal y pimienta al gusto para asentar los sabores, mezcla muy bien.
Agrega las piezas del osobuco selladas y vierte el caldo de carne. Mezcla un poco, tapa y baja el fuego. Cocina por una hora y media aproximadamente hasta que la carne quede tierna.
Una vez lista, apaga y deja reposar.
In a bowl, mix the hot parsley, the lemon fringes and his garlic teeth and a touch of salt.
Serves the perspective and goes with provença wilce. Enjoy!

prune-pistachio-oat-bars.name: Prune-pistachio Oat Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Lightly coat an 8x8” baking pan with vegetable oil spray. Line with parchment paper, leaving a generous overhang on all sides. Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium. Add oats and cook, stirring often, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Let cool on a plate.
Meanwhile, process 3 Tbsp. pistachios in a food processor until finely ground; transfer to a small bowl.
Scrape seeds from vanilla bean into processor and add figs, prunes, ½ cup pistachios, orange zest, orange juice, salt, and 2 Tbsp. water; process until smooth.

Transfer mixture to a medium bowl. Coarsely chop remaining ½ cup pistachios and add to bowl along with oats; mix well. Press firmly into prepared baking pan. Sprinkle with ground pistachios, pressing to adhere. Bake until no longer sticky, 20–25 minutes. Let cool, then cut into bars.
DO AHEAD: Bars can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

pulled-pork-nachos-with-sriracha-slaw.name: Pulled Pork Nachos With Sriracha Slaw
instructions: Combine water, vinegar, Sriracha, sugar, oregano, and salt in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Off heat, stir; cool for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine coleslaw and onion in a large bowl; pour Sriracha mixture on top. Stir; set aside while preparing nachos.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler on low setting.
Spread tortilla chips on a baking sheet; scatter pulled pork on top and top with cheese.
Broil nachos in the preheated oven until cheese is melted, about 6 minutes. Top with Sriracha slaw.

pumpkin-with-yogurt-lezzet.name: Pumpkin With Yogurt

2. Take too much water by reindeing and tightening with your hands (if the middle part is multi-core, take it during the rende).
3. Heat the pan, add olive oil and pumpkins, soak 1-2 minutes salt and pepper in high fire.
4. Take a wire strainer to leave excess water.
5.  5 dakika kadar bekletin.
6. Mix grapes, avocadoyu, walnut, yogurt, cottage cheese and garlic that you crushed with fork.
7. Add the dereot you're fine.

purple-rice-pudding-with-rose-water-date.name: Purple Rice Pudding With Rose Water Dates

ingredients.prep: pitted and cut into thin strips

instructions: 1 To prepare the rice, bring the water and rice to a boil in a small heavy-bottomed saucepan. Decrease the temperature to maintain a simmer, cover, and cook until the rice is tender yet still slightly chewy, about 30 minutes. Some water will remain (do not drain).

2 While the rice is cooking, prepare the date topping. Place the chopped dates in a small bowl and drizzle with 2 teaspoons of the rose water. Add the date strips to a different small bowl and drizzle with the remaining 1 teaspoon rose water. Stir the dates in both bowls and set aside, stirring once or twice more.

3 To finish, add the half-and-half, sugar, salt, 1/2 teaspoon of the lemon zest, cinnamon stick, and vanilla to the rice. Return to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring several times. Decrease the heat to maintain a gentle bubble and cook, uncovered, for 15 more minutes, stirring every few minutes or so. The consistency should be creamy yet soupy — the mixture will thicken as it cools. Remove the saucepan from the heat and remove the cinnamon stick. Stir in the chopped dates and the remaining 1/2 teaspoon lemon zest.
4 Divide the rice pudding among small individual dessert bowls or cups. Garnish with a few of the rose water-infused date strips, and serve warm or at room temperature.
